sourceMovie.title: Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken (2023) as a animation theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The animation and family blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Moana 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken worked for you, Moana 2 (2024) is a strong next pick. The two films share animation and family throughlines and comic timing and sharper banter, even though the stories go in different directions.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Pirates Ahoy!
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken and Scooby-Doo! Pirates Ahoy! (2006) are not the same movie, but they rhyme in the ways that matter. Each commits to animation and family, brings comic timing and sharper banter, and trusts the audience to stay with a bold swing.

faq.question: What should I watch after Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken?
faq.answer: Try Moana 2, Abominable, The Swan Princess—each shares DNA with Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken?
faq.answer: Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken (2023) is best described as Animation, Family, Fantasy, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this animation lane.
